\tzpentry{ID3287}{Magnetic Helicity Evolution Evolution Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3287 introduces Magnetic Helicity Evolution Evolution Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{d \mathcal{H}_M}{dt} = \int_V \left( \frac{ \partial \mathbf{A}}{ \partial t} \cdot \mathbf{B} + \mathbf{A} \cdot \frac{ \partial \mathbf{B}}{ \partial t} \right) dV + \mathcal{O}( \omega_{acoustic}) \end{equation}
